languages.text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан! С момента вашей высадки не произошло ничего, достойного вашего внимания. Корабль все так же находится на орбите мертвого мира".
"Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."
languages.original_text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан! С момента вашей высадки не произошло ничего, достойного вашего внимания. Корабль все так же находится на орбите мертвого мира".

traits.locale_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."
"Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."
"Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."
"Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

languages.text: 「そうです、艦長様！着陸以降、艦長様の注意をひくようなことは何もありません。艦は死の世界の周りを回っています」
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: 「そうです、艦長様！着陸以降、艦長様の注意をひくようなことは何もありません。艦は死の世界の周りを回っています。」

languages.text: «¡Así es, Lord Capitán! No ha sucedido nada digno de su atención desde que aterrizó. La nave sigue orbitando el mundo muerto».
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: «¡Así es, Lord Capitán! No ha sucedido nada digno de su atención desde que aterrizó. La nave sigue orbitando el mundo muerto».

languages.text: "Korrekt, Lord Captain! Seit Eurer Landung ist nichts passiert, was Eurer Aufmerksamkeit würdig wäre. Das Schiff kreist noch immer über der toten Welt."
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: "Korrekt, Lord Captain! Seit Eurer Landung ist nichts passiert, was Eurer Aufmerksamkeit würdig wäre. Das Schiff kreist noch immer über der toten Welt."

languages.text: « En effet, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Il ne s'est rien produit de notable depuis votre départ. Le vaisseau se trouve toujours en orbite autour de ce monde inerte. »
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: « En effet, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Il ne s'est rien produit de notable depuis votre départ. Le vaisseau se trouve toujours en orbite autour de ce monde inerte. »

languages.text: “风平浪静，舰长大人！自您着陆后，舰上未发生任何值得您关注的事件。舰船仍在那颗死寂世界的轨道上运行。”
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: “风平浪静，舰长大人！自您着陆后，舰上未发生任何值得您关注的事件。舰船仍在那颗死寂世界的轨道上运行。”

languages.text: "Yok Lord Kaptan! İnişinizden bu yana dikkatinize değer hiçbir şey olmadı. Gemi hâlâ ölü dünyanın yörüngesinde."
languages.original_text: "Correct, Lord Captain! Nothing worthy of your attention has happened since your landing. The ship is still orbiting the dead world."

traits.locale_text: "Yok Lord Kaptan! İnişinizden bu yana dikkatinize değer hiçbir şey olmadı. Gemi hâlâ ölü dünyanın yörüngesinde."
